class.name: DWM
class.brief_description: Provides access to Windows Desktop Window Manager (DWM) APIs for advanced window effects and customization. 提供对 Windows 桌面窗口管理器 (DWM) API 的访问，用于高级窗口效果和自定义。
class.description:
The [DWM] class allows you to interact with Windows Desktop Window Manager to enable modern Windows 11/10 visual effects such as Mica, Acrylic backdrop materials, custom title bar colors, dark mode, and extend the window frame into client area.
This class is only available on Windows platforms and most methods require a [Window] node as target. All methods are static, so you don't need to instantiate the class.
[b]Note:[/b] Some features require specific Windows versions. For example, [method set_systembackdrop_type] requires Windows 11 Build 22000 or later for Mica effects.
[DWM] 类允许您与 Windows 桌面窗口管理器交互，以启用现代 Windows 11/10 视觉效果，如 Mica、亚克力背景材质、自定义标题栏颜色、深色模式以及将窗口框架扩展到客户端区域。
此类仅在 Windows 平台上可用，且大多数方法需要 [Window] 节点作为目标。所有方法都是静态的，因此您无需实例化该类。
[b]注意：[/b]某些功能需要特定 Windows 版本。例如，[method set_systembackdrop_type] 需要 Windows 11 Build 22000 或更高版本才能使用 Mica 效果。

link.title: Custom Window Title Bars in Godot

method.name: enable_dark_mode
method.description:
Enables or disables dark mode for the specified window's title bar and borders. This affects the native window decorations when using [member DisplayServer.window_set_flag] with [constant DisplayServer.WINDOW_FLAG_BORDERLESS] set to [code]false[/code].
[codeblock] # Enable dark mode for the main window DWM.enable_dark_mode(get_window(), true) [/codeblock]
为指定窗口的标题栏和边框启用或禁用深色模式。当使用 [member DisplayServer.window_set_flag] 并将 [constant DisplayServer.WINDOW_FLAG_BORDERLESS] 设置为 [code]false[/code] 时，这会影响原生窗口装饰。
[codeblock] # 为主窗口启用深色模式 DWM.enable_dark_mode(get_window(), true) [/codeblock]

method.name: enable_hostbackdropbrush
method.description:
Enables or disables the host backdrop brush effect for the window. This is an older DWM effect that allows the window behind to show through. Consider using [method set_systembackdrop_type] for modern alternatives.
启用或禁用窗口的主机背景画笔效果。这是一种较旧的 DWM 效果，允许显示后面的窗口。请考虑使用 [method set_systembackdrop_type] 以获得现代替代方案。

method.name: enable_mmcss
method.description:
Enables or disables Multimedia Class Scheduler Service (MMCSS) for the current process. This can help improve performance for multimedia applications by prioritizing threads.
为当前进程启用或禁用多媒体类计划程序服务 (MMCSS)。这可以通过优先处理线程来帮助提高多媒体应用程序的性能。

method.name: extend_frame_into_client_area
method.description:
Extends the window frame into the client area by specified margins. This is useful for creating custom title bars while keeping native window controls. Set margins to [code]-1[/code] to extend fully in that direction.
[codeblock] # Extend only the top for a custom title bar DWM.extend_frame_into_client_area(get_window(), 0, 0, 32, 0) [/codeblock]
将窗口框架按指定边距扩展到客户端区域。这对于在保留原生窗口控件的同时创建自定义标题栏非常有用。将边距设置为 [code]-1[/code] 可在该方向完全扩展。
[codeblock] # 仅扩展顶部以创建自定义标题栏 DWM.extend_frame_into_client_area(get_window(), 0, 0, 32, 0) [/codeblock]

method.name: get_border_color
method.description:
Returns the current border color of the window as a [Color].
返回窗口的当前边框颜色，以 [Color] 形式表示。

method.name: get_colorization_color
method.description:
Returns the user's global DWM colorization color (the color used for window borders and taskbar). This respects the user's Windows personalization settings.
返回用户的全局 DWM 颜色（用于窗口边框和任务栏的颜色）。这遵循用户的 Windows 个性化设置。

method.name: get_composition_timing_info
method.description:
Returns timing information about the DWM composition process as a Dictionary. Contains data like refresh rate, composition rate, and frame delays.
[b]Note:[/b] This is intended for debugging and performance monitoring purposes.
返回有关 DWM 合成过程的时序信息，以字典形式提供。包含刷新率、合成速率和帧延迟等数据。
[b]注意：[/b]此功能用于调试和性能监控目的。

method.name: get_title_bar_color
method.description:
Returns the current title bar color of the window as a [Color].
返回窗口的当前标题栏颜色，以 [Color] 形式表示。

method.name: is_composition_enabled
method.description:
Returns [code]true[/code] if DWM composition is enabled system-wide. Composition is required for most visual effects.
如果系统范围内启用了 DWM 合成，则返回 [code]true[/code]。大多数视觉效果都需要合成。

method.name: is_title_bar_coloring_supported
method.description:
Returns [code]true[/code] if the current Windows version supports custom title bar coloring. Always check this before calling color-related methods.
如果当前 Windows 版本支持自定义标题栏着色，则返回 [code]true[/code]。在调用与颜色相关的方法之前，请务必检查此项。

method.name: reset_to_default_colors
method.description:
Resets the window's title bar and border colors to system defaults.
将窗口的标题栏和边框颜色重置为系统默认值。

method.name: set_border_color
method.description:
Sets a custom color for the window border.
为窗口边框设置自定义颜色。

method.name: set_systembackdrop_type
method.description:
Sets the system backdrop material type for the window. Available options are: - [constant AUTO]: Automatically choose based on window type - [constant NONE]: No backdrop effect - [constant MAINWINDOW]: Mica effect for main windows (Windows 11+) - [constant TRANSIENTWINDOW]: Acrylic effect for transient windows - [constant TABBEDWINDOW]: Mica Alt effect for tabbed interfaces
[codeblock] # Apply Mica effect to main window DWM.set_systembackdrop_type(get_window(), DWM.MAINWINDOW) [/codeblock]
为窗口设置系统背景材质类型。可用选项包括： - [constant AUTO]：根据窗口类型自动选择 - [constant NONE]：无背景效果 - [constant MAINWINDOW]：主窗口的 Mica 效果（Windows 11+） - [constant TRANSIENTWINDOW]：瞬态窗口的亚克力效果 - [constant TABBEDWINDOW]：选项卡式界面的 Mica Alt 效果
[codeblock] # 为主窗口应用 Mica 效果 DWM.set_systembackdrop_type(get_window(), DWM.MAINWINDOW) [/codeblock]

method.name: set_title_bar_color
method.description:
Sets a custom color for the title bar. If [param sync_border] is [code]true[/code], the border color will be synchronized with the title bar color.
[codeblock] # Set a red title bar DWM.set_title_bar_color(get_window(), Color(0.8, 0.1, 0.1)) [/codeblock]
为标题栏设置自定义颜色。如果 [param sync_border] 为 [code]true[/code]，边框颜色将与标题栏颜色同步。
[codeblock] # 设置红色标题栏 DWM.set_title_bar_color(get_window(), Color(0.8, 0.1, 0.1)) [/codeblock]

constants.constant: Automatically selects an appropriate backdrop type based on the window's context and type. 根据窗口的上下文和类型自动选择适当的背景类型。
No system backdrop effect; uses traditional rendering. 无系统背景效果；使用传统渲染。
Applies the Mica backdrop material, ideal for main application windows. Available on Windows 11 Build 22000+. 应用 Mica 背景材质，适用于主应用程序窗口。可在 Windows 11 Build 22000+ 上使用。
Applies the Acrylic backdrop material, suitable for transient windows like dialogs and flyouts. 应用亚克力背景材质，适用于对话框和弹出窗口等瞬态窗口。
Applies the Mica Alt backdrop material, optimized for applications with tabbed interfaces. 应用 Mica Alt 背景材质，针对具有选项卡式界面的应用程序进行了优化。
